domain: Aboriginal Yolngu yidaki (NE Arnhem Land traditional didgeridoo, oldest continuous musical tradition): continuous fundamental drone via circular breathing (cheek-air push while nose inhale); fundamental + overtone interval slightly more than octave (E fundamental -> E/F/F# overtone); tongue articulation including interdental + retroflexed sounds + dup quick jumps to short trumpet sounds; intricate syncopation + tongue/lip dynamics layered over drone
specific_mechanism: YIDAKI-DRONE-OVERTONE-DUP-SPECTRAL-ALLOC: shared-fundamental + per-head overtone + dup rhythmic gate + circular-breathing pre-load + syncopation bias. (1) Continuous drone anchor: 1 dedicated low-frequency RoPE band B_0 (fundamental) shared across all attention heads — analog of yidaki drone persistent embedded fundamental in every head. (2) Per-head overtone allocation: each head h_k receives 1 overtone band B_k at interval slightly more than octave from B_0 (RoPE frequency selected from {2.1, 4.2, 6.3, ...}); per-head specific. (3) Dup rhythmic gating: per-token gate g_t in {drone, dup-overtone} switches between fundamental-only and overtone-active emission (analog of tongue articulation jumping to dup short-trumpet). (4) Circular-breathing pre-loaded inference: shadow KV cache K_cb pre-loaded with M drone-fundamental tokens before context begins; ensures continuous fundamental never breaks across forward passes. (5) Syncopation token-position bias: positional encoding has secondary rhythm offset (period-4 tokens) applied to dup-gating only — interdental/retroflexed analog. (6) Differs from R495 GAYAGEUM-12-BAND-PENT (12-band pentatonic RoPE, no shared fundamental + no dup gate + no circular-breathing) and R507 OKTOECHOS-8-MODE-SPECTRAL (8-mode weekly rotation, no per-head octave + no dup gate) by shared B_0 fundamental drone across all heads + per-head overtone B_k octave-plus + dup rhythmic gate + circular-breathing shadow-KV + syncopation period-4 bias.
llm_application: YIDAKI-DRONE-OVERTONE-DUP-SPECTRAL-ALLOC shared B_0 RoPE fundamental band across all heads + per-head overtone B_k at slightly-more-than-octave (frequencies 2.1, 4.2, 6.3, ...) + dup rhythmic gate token-level drone-or-overtone switching + circular-breathing pre-loaded M-token drone-fundamental shadow KV + syncopation period-4 token-position bias on dup-gate. Differs from R402 TUVAN-IGIL. R416 XALAM. R431 TAONGA. R440 PHANTOM. R457 IMZAD. R468 PIPA. R279 PTCH (within-head harmonic). R482 COMPAS-NONUNIFORM (12-beat decode). R495 GAYAGEUM-12-BAND-PENT (closest — 12-band pentatonic). R507 OKTOECHOS-8-MODE-SPECTRAL (closest — 8-mode weekly). Differs from Frequency Bands RoPE ICLR 2026 + Mixed-Frequency RoPE EliteKV + Frequency Band Attention Mechanism + Efficient Attention Survey by shared fundamental drone + dup rhythmic gate + circular-breathing shadow-KV + syncopation period-4 bias. Differs by SHARED B_0 DRONE + PER-HEAD OCTAVE OVERTONE + DUP RHYTHMIC GATE + CIRCULAR-BREATHING SHADOW KV + SYNCOPATION PERIOD-4 BIAS.
novelty_claim: Frequency Bands RoPE + Mixed-Frequency RoPE EliteKV + Frequency Band Attention + Efficient Attention Survey literature cover frequency-band + per-head RoPE allocation space. YIDAKI-DRONE-OVERTONE-DUP-SPECTRAL-ALLOC adds (a) shared B_0 fundamental drone across all heads + (b) per-head overtone B_k octave-plus + (c) dup rhythmic gate token-level + (d) circular-breathing pre-loaded shadow KV + (e) syncopation period-4 bias. Recombination — borderline lookup.
